data.location: 1530 Pasadena Avenue South, South Pasadena, FL 33707
data.event_date: Soft opening May 12, grand opening May 18
data.status: soft opening planned for May 12 and a grand opening scheduled for May 18
data.short_description: Burger Monger is opening its first drive-through location in South Pasadena. It is a corporate-owned location with counter-service and staff bringing food to tables, seating about 90 guests plus outdoor seating. The brand has been in the Tampa Bay area since 2010.

data.location: 7573 Raymary St, Units A-B, Bokeelia, FL 33922
data.status: targeting mid-May for the launch of hot food service
data.short_description: Coconut Island Market is already open as a convenience-style market and is targeting mid-May for hot food service launch. It will continue as a convenience shop while adding quick-service food like tacos, hamburgers, burritos, fruit cups, and aguas frescas. Owner Gabriella Ortiz was interviewed on April 9th.

data.location: 1189 SW Pine Island Rd., Cape Coral, FL 33991
data.status: targeting a late May or early June opening
data.short_description: Coffee Rush is targeting a late May or early June opening for its Cape Coral drive-thru location. It will be the brand’s second Florida location after Fort Myers. Owner Tessa Yost was interviewed on March 12th.

data.location: 675 W Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
data.short_description: Pour Intentions Wine Bar is aiming for a mid-May 2026 debut near the Fox Theatre. It is a wine-focused lounge with charcuterie boards, small plates, desserts, and rotating wines. Owner Joseph Dennis is a Level 1 sommelier.

V’s Coffee Collab is targeting a late May opening in Roswell. It is a compact coffee shop with house-roasted coffee, pastries, and outdoor programming. Owner Harrison Bernard is transitioning to his first brick-and-mortar.
Juice Time is aiming for late May in Roswell. It is a dessert and beverage spot with fresh juices, smoothies, crepes, and Middle Eastern desserts.

data.location: 30 Concord Commons Pl SW, Concord, NC 28027
data.short_description: 360 Wine and Spirits is targeting a second-week-of-June opening in Concord. It is a new wine bar focusing on wine, spirits and neighborhood bar atmosphere from owner Timothy Degree.
Blush Room is targeting a June 13 opening in Fayetteville. It is an upscale nightlife concept with hookah, cocktails, themed events, and a dress code from owners Rodreaka Sales and Versace Granberry.

data.status: targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month
data.short_description: Three Rabbits Brewing is targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month at its taproom in Greensboro. It will focus on lagers and European-style beers from owner Christopher Myers.

data.status: planned reopening in late May or early June
data.short_description: Sunset Restaurant is being revived with a planned reopening in late May or early June in Franklin by Jesse and Paige Green.

data.status: targeting late May or the first week of June
data.short_description: Tiny Kitchen is targeting late May or early June in Naples. It is a 680-square-foot Argentinian street food spot with empanadas, choripan, and salads from owner Alejandro Veiga and family.

data.status: targeting an opening in about a month
data.short_description: Casa Cotzelli is targeting an opening in about a month in Naples. It is a full-service Italian restaurant from owner Filippo Butelli.

data.status: targeting an opening at the end of the year or beginning of next year
data.short_description: Cowy Burger is planning a second location in Doral targeting end of year or beginning of next year. It is a smash burger concept from Diego J. Machicao and team.

data.status: targeting a late May or early June opening
data.short_description: Tiny Kitchen is targeting late May or early June in Naples. It serves Argentinian street food with empanadas and choripan under the Casa del Loro umbrella.
Sonrisa is targeting an opening next week in Uptown Charlotte pending liquor license. It is a Latin American restaurant and bar with regional dishes and cocktails.
Three J’s Ice Cream is targeting a mid-May opening in Winter Haven. It is a rolled ice cream shop expanding from a food trailer by owner Jaryaca Baker.
Gin Khao is targeting a May soft opening in Bartow. It is the first brick-and-mortar for the Thai food truck concept.

data.location: 1410 Lake Hearn Dr NE, Atlanta, GA 30319
data.status: planning a July or August opening
data.short_description: Dish's Bagels is planning a July or August opening in Brookhaven. It will feature New York-style bagels and deli sandwiches.
American Deli is slated to open in Alpharetta with permits and remodeling underway.

data.location: 863 Ponce De Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
data.status: targeting an opening in about a month to a month and a half
data.short_description: Pollo Primo is planning a second location targeting an opening in about a month to a month and a half.

data.location: 2131 Pleasant Hill Rd. Suite B-1, Duluth, GA 30096
data.short_description: Blue Polar is targeting a June opening in Duluth. It is a dessert cafe with gelato, coffee, and more.

data.store_name: Pizzeria Fiamma / MackinMikes Mac & Cheeze Bar
data.status: Pizzeria Fiamma opened April 11, MackinMikes expected to open in about two weeks
data.short_description: Pizzeria Fiamma and MackinMikes Mac & Cheeze Bar are opening inside Crooked Can Brewery. Pizzeria Fiamma opened April 11 and MackinMikes in about two weeks.

data.location: 11650 Johns Creek Pkwy, Johns Creek, GA 30097
data.status: grand opening is planned across the entire development for October 29
data.short_description: The Nest Cafe is planning to open its third location with Medley’s grand opening on October 29. It will offer breakfast, brunch, and cafe items.

data.status: targeting an opening within the next one to two months
data.short_description: Bro’s Hot Chicken is preparing to open its third location in Sweetwater targeting one to two months. It is a Nashville hot chicken concept.

data.location: 911 Duluth Highway Suite E1, Lawrenceville, GA 30043
data.short_description: Burger Factory is targeting an end-of-summer opening in Lawrenceville. It is a fast-casual burger concept making its Georgia debut.

data.status: aiming for a late summer opening
data.short_description: The Bep Teahouse is aiming for a late summer opening in Norcross. It is a Vietnamese boba tea shop with full kitchen.
Taqueria & Mariscos Diaz is opening in the coming weeks inside a BP store in Norcross.
Queen P’s Soulfood Kitchen is targeting an opening in Lawrenceville.

data.location: 5157 Jimmy Lee Smith Pkwy #101, Hiram, GA 30141
data.status: anticipates opening toward the end of May
data.short_description: Shawarma Queen is transitioning from food truck to brick-and-mortar targeting end of May in Hiram.

data.location: 1410 Lake Hearn Dr NE, Atlanta, GA 30319
data.status: planning a July or August opening
data.short_description: Dish's Bagels is planning a July or August opening in Brookhaven with New York-style bagels.
American Deli is in the works for Alpharetta with permits and remodeling underway.
Pizzeria Fiamma opened April 11 inside Crooked Can Brewery.

data.status: expected to open in about two weeks
data.short_description: MackinMikes Mac & Cheeze Bar is expected to open in about two weeks inside Crooked Can Brewery.

data.location: 11924 Forest Hill Blvd Suite 26, Wellington, FL 33414
data.short_description: Entre Campos is planning to open May 18th or 25th in Wellington. It is an Argentine-inspired coffee shop.
Casa Vialetto is aiming for an end-of-May reopening in Coral Gables. It brings back Italian fine dining.

data.status: targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month
data.short_description: Three Rabbits Brewing is targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month in Greensboro.
Blush Room is targeting a June 13 opening in Fayetteville as an upscale nightlife concept.

data.location: 30 Concord Commons Pl SW, Concord, NC 28027
data.short_description: 360 Wine and Spirits is a new wine bar from owner Timothy Degree targeting a second-week-of-June opening. The roughly 1,200-square-foot space will have tables, chairs, bar seating and several TVs for about 60 to 70 guests. The menu will focus on wine and spirits with light appetizers and small bites.

data.status: planned reopening in late May or early June
data.short_description: Sunset Restaurant is being revived by Jesse and Paige Green with a planned reopening in late May or early June. The longtime Franklin staple originally opened in 1945 has undergone a full renovation with expanded dining room seating about 130 guests. The menu will continue its focus on Southern comfort food including fried chicken and homemade pies.

data.location: 1882 Goose Creek Road SW Unit 1, Ocean Isle Beach, NC 28469
data.status: Targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks
data.short_description: Waterway Tavern is targeting an opening in the next couple of weeks on the second floor of the Brick Landing clubhouse. It will be a neighborhood tavern with views of the Intracoastal Waterway offering cocktails, beer, wine and small bar snacks. Owner Brittany Bowers is leading the tavern.

data.status: Targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month
data.short_description: Three Rabbits Brewing is targeting a soft opening toward the end of the month with a grand opening expected later in July into August. The 3,400-square-foot brewery and taproom will focus on European-style and German-style lagers. The taproom will have a European pub feel tied to owner Christopher Myers’ German heritage.

Three J’s Ice Cream is preparing to open a new brick-and-mortar location targeting a mid-May debut pending final inspections. The shop will feature a visible cold plate station for rolled ice cream with more than 20 flavor options. Owner Jaryaca Baker named the business after her three sons.

La Pinata is targeting a mid-August opening led by Chef Jonathan Cisneros and Chef Alfredo Ortiz. The full-service restaurant with market-style experience will seat about 28 indoors and 60 outdoors. The menu focuses on authentic Mexican cuisine made in house including birria tacos.

data.location: 3374 North University Drive, Coral Springs, FL 33065
data.short_description: Big Whiskey’s American Restaurant & Bar is targeting a September opening with a possibility of August. The team includes Steve Swanson, Jacki Swanson and Suzanne Swanson.

data.location: 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd., Suites 1 and 2, Jacksonville, FL 32226
data.status: targeting an early to mid-August opening
data.short_description: Southern Smokehouse is targeting an early to mid-August opening as the first barbecue concept from South Atlantic Hospitality. The full-service restaurant will have 120 seats and a full-service liquor bar. Owner Louis Joseph also owns Southern Coast Seafood.

data.location: 330 Ponce De Leon Blvd, Brooksville, FL 34601
data.short_description: Brooksville Bagels is targeting an August 1 opening from co-owners Anastasia Alaimo and Michael Alaimo. The New York-inspired shop has been in development for over two years.

data.location: 9 South Main Avenue, Lake Placid, FL 33852
data.short_description: Cuban Sabor Cafe is targeting a May 8 opening as a grab-and-go Cuban bakery. The menu includes pastelitos, Cuban sandwiches, croquettes, Cuban coffee and sugarcane juice. Owners are Jazmin Ley and Adoni Chao.

data.location: 23 E Main St, Avon Park, FL 33825
data.short_description: Liam’s Avon Park Soda Shop is planning to open Friday, May 15th with a grand opening around 5 p.m. or 5:30 p.m.

data.location: 9 South Main Avenue, Lake Placid, FL 33852
data.short_description: Cuban Sabor Cafe owned by Jazmin Ley and Adoni Chao is targeting a May 8 opening. It is a grab-and-go Cuban bakery with pastelitos, sandwiches, croquettes and Cuban staples. The space will start with six seats.

data.location: 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd., Suites 1 and 2, Jacksonville, FL 32226
data.status: targeting an early to mid-August opening
data.short_description: Southern Smokehouse is preparing to open at 12741 Yellow Bluff Rd. targeting an early to mid-August opening. It is the first barbecue concept from Louis Joseph and Baylee Joseph with 120 seats and a full-service liquor bar. The menu includes traditional barbecue with Southern spins.

Blackberry Creamery & Cafe is targeting a June 15 opening inside an outdoor food truck park. The ice cream-focused concept will offer flavors like butter pecan bourbon and blackberry bliss plus milkshakes and shaved ice. Owners are Raymond Paulk and Lynn Little.

Supra Revolving Sushi Bar is targeting an October–November opening as a full-service restaurant with conveyor belt sushi. The menu includes sushi, hibachi, ramen and alcoholic beverages. Owner is Ivan Lu.

data.location: 12553 Bartram Park Blvd., Suite 302, Jacksonville, FL 32258
data.short_description: Lucky Goat Coffee is targeting a June 18 opening in Bartram Park. It is a fast-casual coffee shop with espresso drinks, cold brew and pastries. Owners are Daniel and Nicole Price.

Big Bone BBQ is targeting a June 6 opening bringing Texas-style barbecue centered on dino beef ribs. The self-serve concept is inside a historic 1918 home with six tables and a five-seat bar. Owners are Donna Deverman-Clay and Samuel Clay.
Donatos Pizza is targeting an opening around August 1st with George Schempf and Chris Doss. The fast-casual restaurant will focus on thin crust pizza with limited seating of nine seats.

data.location: 2401 N. Ponce de Leon Blvd., Unit B, St. Augustine, FL 32084
data.short_description: Maison Louis Cafe is now in a soft-opening phase at its location. The counter-service cafe with 18 indoor seats offers Lavazza coffee, viennoiserie and house-made sandwiches, quiches and salads. Owner Jerome Bensimon expects full opening within about two weeks.
